description:
ICICI Lombard Elevate is an unlimited health insurance plan that provides unlimited sum insured options and access to an infinite claim amount with the Infinite Care benefit.

HDFC ERGO Optima Secure is a comprehensive medical policy that comes with a variety of unique benefits, such as Secure benefit,  Protect benefit and Plus benefit. 

In this video , we will compare both the plan on the basis of features, waiting periods , exclusions as well as premiums.

WATCH THE VIDEO FOR MORE DETAILS :)

To buy insurance policies, click here - https://hareepatti.com/contact-us/

✅ ICICI Lombard Elevate Plan Details : https://youtu.be/cM0qA-GJwFE?si=h-3YOaBlJivjXBNe

✅ HDFC ERGO Optima Secure Details : https://youtu.be/M8-Q0CPXU00?si=M65dIQadPDJOwItp
